description: Hermes Ankh patches for local .agent directory support and scope coverage

banner.description: Show 'with help' in header when running in .agent directory

cli.description: Inject agent.jsonc prompt (identity + environment + user prompt) into CLI config via load_config()

directory.description: Support local .agent/ overrides (via config.yaml), the agent.jsonc manifest, shared scope helpers, daemon anchor, and more.

runtime.description: Managed scopes for runtime data (environment variables, model, toolsets, etc.)

storage.description: Folder-scoped session state with strict .agent/storage/state.db in project scope

skills.description: Folder-scoped skills via get_ankh_scope_root(); skip bundled sync in project scope; scope prompt_builder, memory_tool, SOUL.md

auth.description: Auth dual-read (global+local merge) and local-write when in scope

cron.description: Scope gateway and cron storage paths (config, sessions, delivery, hooks, pairing, caches)
